Door.Access.Command

类 AbstractWatchResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • Door.Access.Command.AbstractWatchResponse
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    INWatchResponse
    直接已知子类:
    Door8800CommandWatchResponse, Door89HCommandWatchResponse

    public abstract class AbstractWatchResponse
extends java.lang.Object
implements INWatchResponse
    监控命令响应的抽象类
